TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Fuxing Itini i Taoyuan ko Fuxing. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 336.75 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 195.32 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 120.65 km²), 10,692 ko tamdaw i Fuxing Cen/ Siyang, 3,655 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 6,817 a tamdaw, pakaala to 64%(Tayal泰雅族) no polong no tamdaw. o Tayal ko sa'alomanay i Taoyuan. O kasaniyarona 10 ko cun, 58 ko niyaro' i Fuxing. Pyasan(比雅山 部落), Rahaw(Takan) , Wsilung , Hbun , Hbun-sinqumi , Kinyawpan , Rangay , Kawbu' , Khpan , Raga' , Rahu'(下宇內 部落), Qapu' , Qus , Yubang , Triqan , Zihing , Kayu-baliq , Kzyay , Tuba , Luhung , Blhuy , Blhuy , Bilus , Qoyaw , Qoyaw , Silong , Qoyaw , Snazi , Kin'lwan , Sqiy , Cyasi , Yuwhbun raka , Kayway , Qus , Qmocyan , Babau , Qnau , Ksunu' , Qehuy , Kuli , Sbunaw , Quri , Uruw , Tkasan , Raka , Piyaway , Tgleq , Saruc , Twan nokan , Zihing , Qrahu , Tqwiy , Ngurus , Qphay , Balung , 'Bu balung , Qara , Quzi .
S.PHON: fo~u~uxiŋ itini i tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u fo~u~uxiŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u ***.** km*), **,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən/ sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(tajaɾ***) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u tajaɾ ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i tao~ujo~u~uan. o~u kasanijaro~una ** ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i fo~u~uxiŋ. pjasan(*** **), raħaw(takan) , wsiɾo~u~uŋ , ħb~b~vo~u~un , ħb~b~vo~u~un-sin*o~u~umi , kinjawpan , raŋaj , kawb~b~vo~u~uʡ , kħpan , ra*aʡ , raħo~u~uʡ(*** **), *apo~u~uʡ , *o~u~us , jo~u~ub~b~vaŋ , tri*an , *iħiŋ , kajo~u~u-b~b~vaɾi* , k*jaj , to~u~ub~b~va , ɾo~u~uħo~u~uŋ , b~b~vɾħo~u~uj , b~b~vɾħo~u~uj , b~b~viɾo~u~us , *o~ujaw , *o~ujaw , siɾo~uŋ , *o~ujaw , sna*i , kinʡɾwan , s*ij , ʦjasi , jo~u~uwħb~b~vo~u~un raka , kajwaj , *o~u~us , *mo~uʦjan , b~b~vab~b~vao~u~u , *nao~u~u , kso~u~uno~u~uʡ , *əħo~u~uj , ko~u~uɾi , sb~b~vo~u~unaw , *o~u~uri , o~u~uro~u~uw , tkasan , raka , pijawaj , t*ɾə* , saro~u~uʦ , twan no~ukan , *iħiŋ , *raħo~u~u , t*wij , ŋo~u~uro~u~us , *pħaj , b~b~vaɾo~u~uŋ , ʡb~b~vo~u~u b~b~vaɾo~u~uŋ , *ara , *o~u~u*i .
S.FORM: Fuxing Itini i Taoyuan ko Fuxing. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 336.75 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 195.32 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 120.65 km²), 10,692 ko tamdaw i Fuxing Cen/ Siyang, 3,655 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 6,817 a tamdaw, pakaala to 64%(Tayal泰雅族) no polong no tamdaw. o Tayal ko sa'alomanay i Taoyuan. O kasaniyarona 10 ko cun, 58 ko niyaro' i Fuxing. Pyasan(比雅山 部落), Rahaw(Takan) , Wsilung , Hbun , Hbun-sinqumi , Kinyawpan , Rangay , Kawbu' , Khpan , Raga' , Rahu'(下宇內 部落), Qapu' , Qus , Yubang , Triqan , Zihing , Kayu-baliq , Kzyay , Tuba , Luhung , Blhuy , Blhuy , Bilus , Qoyaw , Qoyaw , Silong , Qoyaw , Snazi , Kin'lwan , Sqiy , Cyasi , Yuwhbun raka , Kayway , Qus , Qmocyan , Babau , Qnau , Ksunu' , Qehuy , Kuli , Sbunaw , Quri , Uruw , Tkasan , Raka , Piyaway , Tgleq , Saruc , Twan nokan , Zihing , Qrahu , Tqwiy , Ngurus , Qphay , Balung , 'Bu balung , Qara , Quzi .
S.PHON: fo~u~uxiŋ itini i tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u fo~u~uxiŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u ***.** km*), **,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən/ sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(tajaɾ***) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u tajaɾ ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i tao~ujo~u~uan. o~u kasanijaro~una ** ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i fo~u~uxiŋ. pjasan(*** **), raħaw(takan) , wsiɾo~u~uŋ , ħb~b~vo~u~un , ħb~b~vo~u~un-sin*o~u~umi , kinjawpan , raŋaj , kawb~b~vo~u~uʡ , kħpan , ra*aʡ , raħo~u~uʡ(*** **), *apo~u~uʡ , *o~u~us , jo~u~ub~b~vaŋ , tri*an , *iħiŋ , kajo~u~u-b~b~vaɾi* , k*jaj , to~u~ub~b~va , ɾo~u~uħo~u~uŋ , b~b~vɾħo~u~uj , b~b~vɾħo~u~uj , b~b~viɾo~u~us , *o~ujaw , *o~ujaw , siɾo~uŋ , *o~ujaw , sna*i , kinʡɾwan , s*ij , ʦjasi , jo~u~uwħb~b~vo~u~un raka , kajwaj , *o~u~us , *mo~uʦjan , b~b~vab~b~vao~u~u , *nao~u~u , kso~u~uno~u~uʡ , *əħo~u~uj , ko~u~uɾi , sb~b~vo~u~unaw , *o~u~uri , o~u~uro~u~uw , tkasan , raka , pijawaj , t*ɾə* , saro~u~uʦ , twan no~ukan , *iħiŋ , *raħo~u~u , t*wij , ŋo~u~uro~u~us , *pħaj , b~b~vaɾo~u~uŋ , ʡb~b~vo~u~u b~b~vaɾo~u~uŋ , *ara , *o~u~u*i .
